items.speaker: Unknown (83)
items.text:
A massive Hurriclaw stands in the cave, its body covered in dark, writhing growths that burst from its back.
Its mind is corrupted. It stumbles, groaning in delirium. The cave walls bear the marks of its frenzied claws.

items.speaker: "Teeny"
items.text: Wake up, Chunkie!

items.speaker: Unknown (83)
items.text: The Hurriclaw sees Teeny and Arctos, and a spark of awareness flickers in its cloudy eyes.

items.speaker: Chunkie
items.text: Arctos... Teeny...

items.speaker: Arctos
items.text: Chunkie... I'm sorry. I couldn't protect you from the Dark Tide... If only I'd been stronger...

items.speaker: Chunkie
items.text: Chunkie... wants to go home... with Arctos... and everyone... But Chunkie... can't control... Ngh—!

items.speaker: Chunkie
items.text: Chunkie looked for camp... but camp gone. Chunkie went to where Teeny, Arctos, and Chunkie played... but also gone.

items.speaker: Chunkie
items.text: Gone! The dark thing came... and all gone!

items.speaker: Unknown (83)
items.text: As if recalling the painful memoriees, Chunkie begins to thrash and roar in anguish.

items.speaker: Chunkie
items.text: Aaarrrghhh—! It... hurts! AAAARRHHHHH!

items.speaker: Chunkie
items.text: It hurts... so much... Help Chunkie... End this...

items.speaker: Unknown (83)
items.text: You glance at Arctos. He meets your eyes and gives a gentle nod.

items.speaker: Unknown (83)
items.text:
Chunkie's frequency fades along with the Dark Tide, as if it has never existed.
The Dark Tide erases its mind and body, leaving behind nothing but a single feather.

items.speaker: Arctos
items.text: This feather... It's from my old helmet.

items.speaker: Arctos
items.text: When the Dark Tide struck our old camp, as a former Gladiator, I stayed behind to cover everyone's retreat. Chunkie and Teeny also stood with me.

items.speaker: Arctos
items.text: We thought it would be a glorious hunt, but little did we know, we were the ones being hunted by the Dark Tide.

items.speaker: Arctos
items.text: In the end, as the corruption crawled up my helmet, it was Chunkie who charged to save me, knocking aside the tainted helm and pushing me out of harm's way.

items.speaker: Arctos
items.text: But Chunkie...

items.speaker: Arctos
items.text: Chunkie let the Dark Tide take it instead... To protect me and Teeny...

items.speaker: "Teeny"
items.text: Arctos, Teeny hears Chunkie's voice—

items.speaker: "Teeny"
items.text: Teeny, Arctos, and everyone got away... no one hurt...

items.speaker: "Teeny"
items.text: Chunkie can go home now...

items.speaker: Unknown (83)
items.text: Arctos grasps the feather tightly.

items.speaker: Arctos
items.text: Yes, Chunkie. Let's all go home now.

items.speaker: Injured Wootter
items.text: Woo ta ta... Woo ta... Ta ta!

items.speaker: Rover
items.text: Abby, Echo interpretation service, please.

items.speaker: Abby
items.text: Roger that! Your five-star Echo interpreter, at your service! Ahem... Let's try out my new emotional-adaptive mode!

items.speaker: Abby
items.text: Beep—loading complete! Standing by for interpretation request...

items.speaker: Unknown (83)
items.text: Thanks to Abby, you can now understand what the Wootter is saying.

items.speaker: Wootter
items.text: Woo! Danger ahead!

options.text: Have you seen any children come this way?

items.speaker: Unknown (83)
items.text: Abby relays your words to the Wootter. Its chubby face scrunches up in confusion.

items.speaker: Wootter
items.text: Woo. Wootter sees no one. Very dangerous out there. Big monster!

items.speaker: Wootter
items.text: Wootter and friends protect camp and search outside. Wootter hurt. Must stay here.

items.speaker: Wootter
items.text: But Wootter's friends ahead. They help you!

items.speaker: Unknown (83)
items.text: The Wootter plucks some fur from its body and offers it to you.

items.speaker: Wootter
items.text: Follow the scent. It leads you to them!

dialog.stepLabel: Unknown (83): "A tuft of fur left behind catches your eye...."

items.text: As you push the huge stone aside, a brownish shadow darts out.

items.speaker: Unknown (83)
items.text: A tuft of fur left behind catches your eye.

items.speaker: Arctos
items.text: Hold a moment, young warrior...

items.speaker: Arctos
items.text: It shames me to ask this of you, but… I don't know who else to turn to.

items.speaker: Arctos
items.text: Could you help me find my children?

items.speaker: Arctos
items.text: The Dark Tide ravages everything in its path. So many innocent lives lost. And the ones who went mad turned the camp upside down.

items.speaker: Arctos
items.text: See the claw marks around camp? My friends, fallen. My children, missing. And I... I can't lift a sword with these injuries.

items.speaker: Arctos
items.text: Sometimes I hate these old bones of mine... I don't even know whether it's the Dark Tide or just the weight of years that's made me this useless.

options.text: I'll help you find your children.
Don't worry. Leave it to me.

items.speaker: Arctos
items.text: Thank you. Young people like you always have such courage.

items.speaker: Arctos
items.text: Before I fainted, I last saw my children running toward the iron gates.
